title: AWS Cloud Architecture
description: Designed and deployed event-driven systems using Lambda, SQS, SNS, and containerized services on ECS.
items: Built serverless workflows for async message processing and notification delivery
Configured auto-scaling policies and monitoring with CloudWatch
Managed infrastructure as code for reproducible deployments

title: Azure Platform Deployment
description: Deployed and managed scalable web applications on Azure with high availability requirements.
items: Configured App Services and container deployments for production workloads
Achieved 99.9% uptime for client-facing SaaS applications
Implemented environment separation for staging and production releases

title: API & Microservices Engineering
description: Built RESTful APIs and microservice architectures for high-traffic, multi-tenant applications.
items: Developed REST APIs with authentication, rate limiting, and comprehensive error handling
Integrated Apache Kafka for event streaming between distributed services
Optimized database queries and caching strategies for API performance
